name: Kaitori Okoku Co., Ltd.
summary: Kaitori Okoku Co., Ltd. engages in the retail business in Japan. It sells second-hand goods, including clothing, clothing accessories, hobby products, trading cards, luxury brand products, precious metals, home appliances, mobile phones, miscellaneous goods, trading cards, games, alcohol, money vouchers, etc. The company also franchises its stores. Kaitori Okoku Co., Ltd. was founded in 1999 and is headquartered in Nagoya, Japan.
